title: Harnessing Europe’s Data Potential: How HONEUR Can Help Improve Patient Outcomes [Promoted Content]
summary_full: Real-world evidence can enable improved patient outcomes, but Europe must strengthen RWD infrastructure and policy frameworks to meaningfully inform high-quality decision-making. RWE initiatives like HONEUR can support better healthcare choices and accelerate equitable patient access to innovation.
